catalog_content:
Item Name: Simply Organic Almond Extract, Certified Organic | 2 oz | Pack of 6 Bullet Point 1: Packaging may vary – same Simply Organic quality, now in a new standout look. Bullet Point 2: ALMOND EXTRACT - Simply Organic Almond Extract adds a warm, mellow, almond flavor to baked goods and desserts like pies, pastries, turnovers, bear claws and croissants. Add the sweet essence of nut to frostings and fillings or even rice pudding or curry. Bullet Point 3: VERSATILE AND FLAVORFUL - Our almond extract is a useful addition to any pantry or spice cabinet. Use almond extract to enhance baked goods like Dutch letters, baklava, cookies and cherry pie. Add it to smoothies to change up the flavor. Add it to warm beverages for a comforting twist. The mild yet earthy, toasty flavor of our pure organic Almond Extract is so good, it was scored a “FAVORITE” Organic Almond Extract by Epicurious in 2021. Bullet Point 4: ORGANIC FROM THE UNITED STATES - We develop genuine relationships at the source with growers, ensuring production that is environmentally friendly and yields high-quality organic almonds and an excellent flavor profile. Bullet Point 5: PURE AND POTENT FLAVOR - Simply Organic believes in pure and potent flavor grown at the source. Our rigorous standards mean that we know precisely what you’re getting, and from where. All of our products are grown and processed without the use of toxic pesticides, irradiation, or GMOs. Bullet Point 6: ABOUT US - Simply Organic is a 100% certified organic line of spices, seasoning mixes, and baking flavors. Our pure, potent spices, seasonings and extracts bring real bite to everything you make, eat and share. Our goal, through our Simply Organic Giving Fund, is to help the millions of food insecure by not only providing funds and support to make organic food more accessible, but also in developing the next generation of leaders in sustainable and socially just organic agriculture. Product Description: Made with organic almonds (Prunus dulcis) grown right here in the United States. No artificial colors, no imitation flavors, no GMOs and no added sugars. You get the true, sweet almond flavor and the heavenly aroma that comes from pure almond essence. Certified organic by QAI, Gluten free, Kosher certified by KSA.

Best uses:
Ideal for baked goods like Dutch letters, baklava, cookies and cherry pie. Add it to smoothies to change up the flavor. Add it to warm beverages for a comforting twist.

Features:
- 2 oz glass bottle
- Organic, kosher, and non-irradiated
- High quality almond extract
- Aromatic and warming

Ingredients:
Water, organic alcohol, organic glycerin, bitter almond oil Value: 12.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Certified organic almond extract from a trusted brand, positioned as a high-quality baking ingredient. Glass bottle packaging and organic certifications suggest a mid-to-premium pricing tier. Bundle deal of 6 bottles offers value for bulk buyers or frequent bakers. No artificial colors, GMOs, or added sugars further justify its premium positioning.
